steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
The notation $f(x)$ gives the output of the function for a chosen input $x$. The question asks for the output when the input is $3$, so replace $x$ with $3$ in the expression.
$$f(3)=28(3)+75$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content: Multiply first, then add. $$28(3)+75=84+75=159$$ This value is the function output for the requested input. The answer is C.
